# A survey on popularity bias in recommender systems

**Authors:** Anastasiia Klimashevskaia et al.  
**Year:** 2024  
**URL:** https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s11257-024-09406-0  
**Evidence type:** Survey

## Claim supported

Many recommender systems exhibit popularity bias.

## Key result

Survey finds today’s recommendation algorithms often focus on already-popular items.

## How it supports manufactured traction

This source strengthens the argument that digital systems can be moved by manipulated proxy signals. Use it as evidence for the mechanism, not as proof that every campaign succeeds.
